metadata.title: Hide Commands in Menu
metadata.description: Hide Commands in Menu Localization & Tweaks

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Delay time to process menu hiding (default 1 millisecond).
ast.target: 处理菜单隐藏的延迟时间（默认1毫秒）。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Enter command names as a line-separated list (one command per line). Commands are case-sensitive. Changes will take effect after restarting Obsidian or reloading the plugin.
ast.target: 以换行分隔的列表形式输入命令名称（每行一个命令）。命令区分大小写。更改将在重启 Obsidian 或重新加载插件后生效。
